_comment: Model manifest for SWOT Builder. Records every AI model the app offers to the user, its source, licence, and download size. This file is the single source of truth for the model catalogue and is reviewed on every model change. See docs/stacks/browser-ai-application.md.

runtime.note: SRI hash cannot be computed at setup time because jsDelivr serves a UMD bundle that is not identical to the npm package file. Hash to be computed from the live CDN file and added in Phase 2 remediation.

tier_1.name: Chrome built-in AI (Prompt API)
tier_1.description: Gemini Nano running on-device inside Chrome 127 and later. Zero download for the application to manage. Availability detected at runtime via window.ai.languageModel.
tier_1.models: Managed by the browser; not listed here.

tier_2.name: WebLLM on WebGPU
tier_2.description: User-selected model downloaded to the browser cache and run on the GPU via WebGPU. Requires Chrome or Edge 113 and later.

tier_3.name: Manual mode
tier_3.description: Pre-generated questions embedded in swot-engine.jsx. No model or download required. Works in every browser.
